title: stackwise agents/instruction.md (frontmatter)
description: The CLI writes this file to hand off one discrete pipeline step to the main agent / a skill. The main agent reads the YAML frontmatter and then the prose body.

prd_source.description: Only for step=prd_reader. One of url:<…>, file:<path>, text:<inline>.

current_task.description: Only for step=code_writer. The id of the task the skill should execute this invocation.

diff_base.description: Only for step=code_reviewer. Git ref (e.g. merge-base sha).

coverage_threshold.description: Only for step=test_writer. Copied from config.

constraints.description: User-supplied extra constraints gathered during approval gates.
